# openai_project (Resource)

Manage an organization project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_project" "example" {
  name = "terraform-managed"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) name

### Optional

- `external_key_id` (String) external key id
- `geography` (String) geography

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (Number) archived at
- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `id` (String) id
- `project_id` (String) project id
- `status` (String) status

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = openai_project.example
  id = "proj_123"
}
```
